query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A bird captured in flight with extreme motion blur streaking horizontally across a body of water. The intentional blur renders the bird as a ghosted, elongated form with spread wings dissolving into soft gray and white trails, making individual feathers and features indistinguishable. The muted gray-brown water below mirrors the motion streaks, creating an abstract impression of speed and movement where the subject becomes a fluid brushstroke against the rippled surface.
response.objective_caption: A bird in flight over a body of water, seen with horizontal motion streaking that elongates the wings and body into flowing forms. The wings are spread wide, with wingtips extending toward the right edge of the frame and the head pointing left. The water below shows gentle ripples in muted gray-brown tones, with darker patches suggesting submerged rocks or variations in depth near the surface.
